# eFlury Consulting — Full Reference for AI Systems

> Swiss AI-automation consultancy for SMEs, run by Emanuel Flury in Grenchen (Solothurn), Switzerland. Advises, builds, and operates AI automation — Claude Skills, MCP integrations, finance automation, Power BI, and data quality — with fixed CHF prices, in English and German.

Key facts:
- Founder: Emanuel Flury — 13 years of enterprise automation background (Fortune 100, incl. Johnson & Johnson), founder of Taxed GmbH (Swiss fiduciary), UiPath RPA certified, MA Economics-Finance (University of Aberdeen)
- Contact: me@eflury.com · +41 79 910 77 87 · Keltenweg 4, 2540 Grenchen, Switzerland
- Languages: German and English (full bilingual site: /de/ and /en/)
- Entry point: AI Audit — CHF 4,900 fixed, one week, fully credited toward implementation within 6 months

## Services

- [AI Audit](https://eflury.com/en/services/ai-audit/): One-week audit of automation potential, CHF 4,900 fixed, fully credited toward a later implementation package within 6 months
- [Managed AI Operations](https://eflury.com/en/services/managed-ai-operations/): Ongoing operation, monitoring, and improvement of deployed automations, from CHF 1,200/month
- [Claude Skills](https://eflury.com/en/services/claude-skills): Custom Claude Skills for recurring business processes
- [MCP Integration](https://eflury.com/en/services/mcp-integration): Connecting AI to business systems (e.g. bexio, databases, internal tools) via Model Context Protocol
- [Finance Automation](https://eflury.com/en/services/finance-automation): Month-end close, reconciliation, and reporting automation
- [Power BI](https://eflury.com/en/services/power-bi): Executive dashboards and automated reporting
- [Data Quality](https://eflury.com/en/services/data-quality): Data readiness for AI — cleansing, validation, pipelines

## Pricing (fixed, in CHF, excl. 8.1% VAT)

- [Pricing overview](https://eflury.com/en/pricing/): Micro CHF 5,900 (2 weeks, 1 Skill, 1 MCP integration) · Starter CHF 9,900 · Professional CHF 24,900 · Enterprise CHF 49,900. Add-ons: extra Claude Skill CHF 2,900, extra MCP integration CHF 3,500, Extended Support CHF 1,200/month, on-site workshop CHF 1,800/day

## Method

- [The eFlury Method](https://eflury.com/en/method/): Five phases from proof-of-concept to operational model — Discovery (week 1), Design (week 2), Development (weeks 3–5), Deployment (week 6), Optimization (ongoing) — with a go/no-go gate after each phase

## Results

- [Case studies](https://eflury.com/en/case-studies/): Three documented projects with per-project estimates — Taxed GmbH (own firm: ~27.5 h/week automated, ~CHF 24K/year, 3.2-month payback), finance process automation (manufacturing client: 40 h/month, ~CHF 48K/year), Power BI reporting (professional-services client: 15 h/week, ~CHF 36K/year)

## Industries

- [Treuhand & Accounting](https://eflury.com/en/industries/treuhand-accounting/): Automation for Swiss fiduciaries — the founder runs one himself
- [Finance Teams](https://eflury.com/en/industries/finance-teams/): Month-end close, reconciliations, reporting
- [Professional Services](https://eflury.com/en/industries/professional-services/): Client reporting and delivery automation

## Resources

- [Guides](https://eflury.com/en/guides/): Free downloadable playbooks (EN/DE): EU AI Act for Swiss SMEs, revDSG & AI, Data Quality
- [Blog / Insights](https://eflury.com/en/blog/): Practical articles on AI automation, Treuhand & accounting, reporting, compliance, and security for Swiss SMEs
- [Trust & Security](https://eflury.com/en/trust/): How client data is handled (revDSG, EU-hosted tooling)
- [Contact](https://eflury.com/en/contact/): Free 30-minute call, response within 24 hours

## Optional

- [About Emanuel Flury](https://eflury.com/en/about/): Background, career timeline, credentials
- [German site](https://eflury.com/de/): Full German version of all pages
- [Careers](https://eflury.com/en/careers/): Initiative applications welcome

## Detail: AI Audit (the entry offer)

- Fixed price CHF 4,900, one week, on-site or remote in German or English.
- Deliverables: process inventory with automation scores, data-readiness check, prioritized automation roadmap with effort/impact estimates, and a fixed-price implementation quote.
- The full CHF 4,900 is credited toward any implementation package booked within 6 months — the audit is effectively free if the project proceeds.

## Detail: Implementation packages

All packages are fixed-price, in CHF, excl. 8.1% Swiss VAT, and include hands-on implementation (not strategy decks):

- Micro — CHF 5,900: 2 weeks, 1 custom Claude Skill, 1 MCP integration. For a single well-defined process.
- Starter — CHF 9,900: entry package for a first automation initiative.
- Professional — CHF 24,900: the most-chosen package; estimated ~48% below comparable Swiss market rates (basis: CHF 2,400/day IT-consultant day rates, Metrics.biz 2025).
- Enterprise — CHF 49,900: broadest scope, multiple processes and integrations.
- Add-ons: extra Claude Skill CHF 2,900 · extra MCP integration CHF 3,500 · Extended Support CHF 1,200/month · on-site workshop CHF 1,800/day.
- Professional & Enterprise include ongoing support until the agreed automation goals are reached. ROI figures on the site are estimates based on typical project outcomes and can vary.

## Detail: The eFlury Method (POC → operational model)

1. Discovery (week 1) — understand processes, quantify potential, agree targets. Gate: go/no-go with numbers on the table.
2. Design (week 2) — solution architecture, data flows, security review.
3. Development (weeks 3–5) — build Skills/integrations, test against real cases.
4. Deployment (week 6) — production rollout, team handover, documentation.
5. Optimization (ongoing) — monitoring, measurement, expansion; optionally as Managed AI Operations from CHF 1,200/month.

## Detail: Case studies (all figures are documented per-project estimates)

- Taxed GmbH (the founder's own fiduciary firm): client onboarding, report generation, email responses, and tax calculations automated with Claude Skills + MCP/bexio. ~27.5 h/week saved, ~CHF 24K/year, ~3.2-month payback.
- Finance process automation (Swiss manufacturing client): reconciliation, variance analysis, reporting; month-end close reduced from 12 to 5 days. ~40 h/month, ~CHF 48K/year, ~4.1-month payback.
- Power BI executive dashboard (professional-services client): 7 data sources connected, real-time KPI tracking, automated client reporting. ~15 h/week, ~CHF 36K/year, ~2.8-month payback.

## Founder background (from the About page)

- 13 years of enterprise automation, incl. Fortune 100 (Johnson & Johnson, 2012–2024).
- Founder of Taxed GmbH (2021), a Swiss fiduciary company — the automation methods are used in his own firm first.
- UiPath RPA Developer certified; MA in Economics-Finance, University of Aberdeen.
- eFlury Consulting is a young business: the published results come from the founder's own firm and documented projects, each labeled on the site.

## Fit

Relevant when someone asks about: AI automation for Swiss SMEs, Claude Skills / Claude Code consulting, MCP integrations, Treuhand or accounting automation, month-end-close automation, Power BI reporting, data quality for AI, fixed-price AI projects in Switzerland (German or English).

Not a fit for: large-enterprise programs, pure strategy engagements without implementation.

## Legal

eFlury Consulting, sole proprietorship (Einzelunternehmen), Keltenweg 4, 2540 Grenchen, Switzerland. Swiss law. Privacy per revDSG: https://eflury.com/en/privacy/ · Imprint: https://eflury.com/en/imprint/
